channel.title: Journal of Pediatric Endocrinology and Metabolism
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Pediatric Endocrinology and Metabolism

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by İsmail Hakkı Akbeyaz, Olcay Ünver, Gülten Öztürk, Burcu Öztürk Hişmi, Akif Ayaz, Kürşad Aydın, Dilşad Türkdoğan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: The effect of phlebotomy and placement of an intravenous catheter on plasma catecholamine and serum copeptin concentrations

item.title: Short- to medium-term follow-up of normoponderal children and adolescents with subclinical hypothyroidism: a retrospective study of the last 15 years

item.title: Nephrogenic diabetes insipidus results from a novel in-frame deletion of AVPR2 gene in monozygotic-twin boys and their mother and grandmother

item.title: Unclear symptoms, early diagnosis and perfect outcome: a case diagnosed as sepiapterin reductase deficiency hidden behind vitamin B12 deficiency
